_comment: Native runtime libraries for Jukebox-Visualizations (libprojectM + GLEW). Each asset is a flat zip (Windows) or tar.gz (Linux) that extracts directly into lib/. The fetch-natives.ps1 / fetch-natives.sh scripts download only the assets matching the current platform, verify the SHA-256 checksum, and extract into lib/. To update libprojectM: bump the projectM source ref in .github/workflows/build-natives.yml, run the workflow to rebuild + republish the release, then bump the URL + sha256 here. See THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md for licensing.
_comment_versioning: Bump this version when updating any asset — used by fetch-natives to skip already-fetched files when the manifest hasn't changed.
_comment_assets: Each asset has: name (human-readable), platform (win-x64 | linux-x64 | osx-arm64), url (download URL — GitHub release asset from the build-natives workflow), sha256 (lowercase hex, no spaces), archive_type (zip | tar.gz), extract_to (always 'lib/' for this repo).

assets.name: ProjectM visualizer engine (Windows)
assets._comment_license: LGPL v2.1+. Built from source by .github/workflows/build-natives.yml. See THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md.
